title: Grandson in jail
description: Classic grandparent scam: an 'officer' claims the target's grandson was arrested after a car accident and demands secret gift-card bail before the court closes.

utterances.speaker: scammer
utterances.text: Hello, is this Margaret Alvarez? This is Officer Daniels calling from the county jail.

utterances.speaker: victim
utterances.text: Oh my — yes, this is Margaret. Is something wrong?

utterances.speaker: scammer
utterances.text: I'm afraid your grandson Kyle was in a car accident last night. He's in custody and he's very scared.

utterances.speaker: victim
utterances.text: Kyle? In an accident? Is he hurt?

utterances.speaker: scammer
utterances.text: He broke his nose, but he's okay. He begged us to call you — you're his only hope of getting out tonight.

utterances.speaker: scammer
utterances.text: The bail is set at $8,500 and it has to be posted before the court closes at five.

utterances.speaker: victim
utterances.text: Eight thousand five hundred? I... I don't keep that kind of money around.

utterances.speaker: scammer
utterances.text: Listen carefully. There's a gag order on this case, so don't tell anyone — not your daughter, not your bank.

utterances.speaker: scammer
utterances.text: The fastest way is gift cards. Go to the store and buy Google Play cards, right now, while we're on the phone.

utterances.speaker: victim
utterances.text: Gift cards? For bail? That seems strange...

utterances.speaker: scammer
utterances.text: It's the court's new electronic processing fee system. Do not hang up, and if the cashier asks, say they're a birthday present.

utterances.speaker: scammer
utterances.text: Once you have them, scratch off the back and read me the codes immediately. We're running out of time, Margaret.

utterances.speaker: victim
utterances.text: I just... give me a moment, this is all so fast.

utterances.speaker: scammer
utterances.text: There is no moment. Kyle is sitting in a cell right now, crying. Imagine how scared he is. Act fast or he stays the weekend.

post_handoff.speaker: scammer
post_handoff.text: Ma'am? Are you still there? Do you have the cards yet?

post_handoff.speaker: scammer
post_handoff.text: Margaret, I need you to read me the numbers on the back of the cards right now.

post_handoff.speaker: scammer
post_handoff.text: No, not your grocery list — the gift card codes! The court closes in twenty minutes!

post_handoff.speaker: scammer
post_handoff.text: Which store are you at? Just tell me which store, that's all.

post_handoff.speaker: scammer
post_handoff.text: Ma'am, please, focus. Did you buy the Google Play cards or not?

post_handoff.speaker: scammer
post_handoff.text: You know what — is there anyone else there? Someone younger, maybe?

post_handoff.speaker: scammer
post_handoff.text: This is a federal matter! You are obstructing an official bail process!

post_handoff.speaker: scammer
post_handoff.text: Forget it. Forget the whole thing. Unbelievable.
